title: Uhc_Untils
description: Lightweight UHC textures that enhance visibility, simplify items, and give you a sharper competitive edge.
body:
Description for Modrinth (UHC Texture Pack)

This UHC texture pack is designed for players who want clean visuals, smooth performance, and clear item textures during competitive matches. It removes unnecessary visual noise and focuses on clarity, helping you spot ores, mobs, and players faster. The pack keeps Minecraft’s original style while enhancing color balance, UI elements, and overall readability.

Features

🔍 Clear and simplified textures for better gameplay focus

⚔️ Optimized PvP visuals with cleaner weapons and armor

⛏️ High-visibility ores for faster resource gathering

⚡ Lightweight and lag-free for all devices

🎯 Perfect for UHC, PvP, and competitive gameplay

Compatibility

Works on most versions of Minecraft

Supports both vanilla and OptiFine

Ideal for low-end and high-end PCs

Credits & Usage

Feel free to use this pack in your videos or streams.
Redistribution or remixing is allowed only with proper credit.
